commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the bundled oc-path plugin, tests, and CLI docs to accept slash-deep JSON/JSONC paths, add `openclaw path set --value-json`, and reject non-finite parsed JSON replacement values.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source rejects slash-deep `openclaw.json` paths with `OC_PATH_TOO_DEEP`, and the linked issue includes the same shipped v2026.5.22 CLI error; I did not execute the CLI because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can remove the oxlint-only parser assertions; maintainer review is still needed for the public oc-path contract after CI is green.

target.title: Fix oc-path deep config edits
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
